programme.title: beIN STORY
programme.desc: beIN STORY est un rendez-vous documentaire, de 70 à 90 minutes, revenant sur un moment clé de l'histoire du sport ou sur une légende des stades. L'émission est présentée par le ou la journaliste et l'un(e) des consultant(e)s du sport concerné. Evènement imprévu, athlète au destin tragique ou moment crucial qui a changé pour toujours une discipline sportive, beIN STORY présente de grands documentai

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Swansea City take on Crystal Palace at the Liberty Stadium in a high-scoring encounter in the 2016-17 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Charlton/WHU '01
programme.desc: Relive one of the Premier League's great games. Here, Charlton Athletic take on West Ham United at The Valley in November 2001 in a pulsating encounter that went down to the wire.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man City/Man Utd 2002
programme.desc: Relive one of the Premier League's great games. Here, Manchester City take on Manchester United back in 2002 in the last Manchester derby to be played at Maine Road.

programme.title: PL Legends: Robbie Fowler
programme.desc: Series profiling some of the greatest players to grace the Premier League. Here the focus is on former Liverpool, Manchester City and Leeds United striker Robbie Fowler.

programme.title: PL Legends: Jamie Carragher
programme.desc: A profile of former Liverpool player Jamie Carragher. The defender spent his whole senior career at Anfield, winning numerous trophies including the 2005 UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: PL 100 Club: Mo Salah
programme.desc: A celebration of some of the finest goalscorers in Premier League history. This episode features the best of Mo Salah's strikes for Liverpool.

programme.title: PL 100 Club: Sadio Mane
programme.desc: A celebration of Liverpool's Senegalese maestro, Sadio Mané; the third player from the continent of Africa to reach the illustrious Premier League 100 club.
